description: A customer who paid in advance has canceled their order and is due a refund.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the customer has a credit balance on their account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer has a credit balance from the advance payment.

nodes.task_description: Process a payment request through Accounts Payable to issue a check to the customer for the credit balance amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a payment request in the AP system to refund the customer.

nodes.task_description: Post a transaction in Accounts Receivable to clear the credit balance from the customer's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts a debit memo to clear the customer's credit balance.
